bookingSummary: A deep dive into your chart. Your core themes, gifts, patterns, and what the current stars are saying about where you are right now.
briefDescription: A deep dive into your chart revealing your core themes, gifts, patterns and what the current stars are saying about where you are right now.
expandedDetails: We'll take a look at your natal chart and the specific energies, timing and patterns that shape your experience.

This is one of the most powerful tools for self understanding I know. When you see yourself clearly through your chart, things start to fall into place. Choices make sense. Experiences make sense. You make sense.
Delivered as a detailed voice note and a supporting PDF within 7 days of payment.
includes: Your gifts, wounds and soul patterns
Current transits and what they mean for you
name: The Birth Chart Reading

seo.metaDescription: What the stars already said about you. Core themes, natural gifts, and current patterns — written and spoken just for you. Delivered in 7 days.

subtitle: Birth Chart Reading
valueProposition: Understand yourself in a way that makes sense of your life
